name: Agent Hero
description: A high-visibility hero section for AI agent identification and messaging.

guidelines.purpose: Agent Hero is the entry-point component for AI chat interfaces, introducing the agent's name and primary greeting message with high visual emphasis.

anatomy.container: agenthero. var(--size-card-width-lg) width, var(--sizing-500) gap between header and title.
anatomy.icon: agenthero__icon. 32xvar(--sizing-800) circular gradient badge containing a center icon.
anatomy.name: agenthero__name. var(--sizing-400) bold, var(--color-content-primary), intended for the product or agent brand name.
anatomy.title: agenthero__title. var(--sizing-600) bold, line-height var(--line-height-title-medium). Large greeting or value proposition text.

specs.spacing: var(--sizing-700) internal padding when used within hero wrappers.
specs.typography: High-contrast var(--color-content-primary) for all text elements.
